name: Chicken W/fennel, Red Pepper & Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into even pieces, season with salt and pepper, and sprinkle with thyme.
2. Heat olive oil in a large skillet, cook the cutlets for about 2 minutes on each side, then cover and set aside while preparing vegetables and rice.
3. Remove fennel fronds, quarter the bulb through the core, remove the core, and slice into 1/4 inch strips. Slice the red pepper into 1/4 inch strips.
4. In a heavy pan, combine rice, chicken stock, and olive oil. Bring to a boil, then lower heat, cover, and simmer for about 18 minutes without lifting the lid. Season with salt and pepper, stir in Parmesan cheese, and remove the cooked cutlets to serving platter.
5. Add 1 tablespoon olive oil to the skillet, heat, add fennel and red pepper, and stir fry for about 3 minutes.
6. Add wine, cover, and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
7. To serve, place a layer of rice on a dish, top with chicken cutlets, and garnish with fennel and pepper strips.
